themes.name: Monster Intel
themes.author: EmuLnk Team
themes.description: Minimal monster HP overlay for MH4U. Shows name, HP bar, and enrage indicator.

themes.name: EmuDex
themes.author: EmuLnk Team
themes.description: Hoenn Pokedex companion with party stats, battle damage calculator, catch rate analysis, and Nuzlocke tracker.

themes.name: EmuDex
themes.author: EmuLnk Team
themes.description: Kanto Pokedex companion with party stats, battle damage calculator, catch rate analysis, and Nuzlocke tracker.

themes.name: EmuDex
themes.author: EmuLnk Team
themes.description: Kanto Pokedex companion with party stats, battle damage calculator, catch rate analysis, and Nuzlocke tracker.

themes.name: Crystal Widgets
themes.author: EmuLnk Team
themes.description: Minimal type badges and move effectiveness overlay for Pokemon Crystal battles. Tiny widgets you can place next to HP bars and the move list.

themes.name: Companion
themes.author: EmuLnk Team
themes.description: Dual-mode companion for Pokemon Crystal. Shows hidden DVs, Stat Exp, and Hidden Power in the overworld; reveals enemy HP, moves, and types during battle.

games.name: The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker

themes.name: Great Sea Navigator
themes.author: EmuLnk Team
themes.description: Live minimap showing Link's real-time position on the Great Sea chart. Displays heading, hearts, rupees, and compass bearing.

themes.name: Great Sea Widgets
themes.author: EmuLnk Team
themes.description: Widget-based overlay for Wind Waker. Includes minimap, hearts, rupees, compass, and wind control. Drag and resize freely.

themes.name: Combo Tracker
themes.author: EmuLnk Team
themes.description: Live combo tracker for Phantasy Star IV. Reads party state from Genesis RAM and shows which hidden combination attacks are currently available.

themes.name: Mission HUD
themes.author: EmuLnk Team
themes.description: Live mission HUD for GoldenEye 007. Objective checklist, health, armor, weapon, and timer. No more pausing mid-mission.

themes.name: HeartGold Move Effectiveness
themes.author: EmuLnk Team
themes.description: Move effectiveness overlay for Pokemon HeartGold battles. Shows type advantage badges next to the move list.

themes.name: HeartGold Widgets
themes.author: EmuLnk Team
themes.description: Minimal type badges for Pokemon HeartGold battles. Two tiny widgets you can place next to the HP bars.

themes.name: Auto-Map
themes.author: EmuLnk Team
themes.description: Progressive auto-map for NES Metroid. Reveals rooms as Samus explores, plus health, missiles, equipment, and boss tracker.

themes.name: Battle HUD
themes.author: EmuLnk Team
themes.description: Always-on battle HUD for Final Fantasy VII. Shows enemy HP, weaknesses, absorbs.

themes.name: Grimoire
themes.author: EmuLnk Team
themes.description: Gothic companion with live minimap, enemy HP bars, familiar interactions, and alchemy crafting.

themes.name: Hunter HUD
themes.author: EmuLnk Team
themes.description: Live monster HP bar, species identifier, and radar showing player and monster positions. Reveals hidden monster health.

themes.name: Visor
themes.author: EmuLnk Team
themes.description: Real-time status HUD for Super Metroid. Energy, ammo, equipment, boss tracker, and item %.
